nasb.text: And the Lord struck Benjamin before Israel, so that the sons of Israel destroyed 25,100 men of Benjamin that day, all who draw the sword.

esv.text: And the Lord defeated Benjamin before Israel, and the people of Israel destroyed 25,100 men of Benjamin that day. All these were men who drew the sword.

cnv.text: 耶和華在以色列人面前擊敗了便雅憫人；那天以色列人消滅便雅憫人，共二萬五千一百名，都是拿刀的。

ccb.text: 耶和华帮助以色列人战胜了便雅悯人。那天，以色列人杀了便雅悯两万五千一百刀兵。
